name: Bastion
description: The outer gates have fallen. Now you hold the inner ward against endless waves. Survive the onslaught or strike out to break their momentum.

scoringRules.description: Defender +1 VP at End of Turn if 50% of starting models are in Ward Zone
Defender +1 VP per kill immediately when exiting Ward (Sally Forth)

specialRules.name: Bastion
specialRules.description: Defenders award +1 VP at End of Turn if 50% of starting models are in Ward Zone

specialRules.name: Breakthrough
specialRules.description: Horde models touching Ward trigger Alpha, Beta, and Gamma markers. Gamma is immediate Horde victory

specialRules.name: Sally Forth
specialRules.description: Defenders exiting Ward to kill Horde models award +1 VP per kill immediately

_balance.notes: Asymmetric siege - Defender holds, Horde attacks
